shopping_results.title: String - Title of the item result
shopping_results.thumbnails: Array - List of URLs to the item thumbnails
shopping_results.seller: String - Seller's name of the item
shopping_results.extracted_price: Numeric - Item price as a float or integer (Ex: '14.99')
shopping_results.extracted_old_price: Numeric - Item's old price as float or integer (Ex: '15.99')
shopping_results.sale: Boolean - Is the item on sale
shopping_results.price_drop: String - The percentage of the price drop

installments.installments: String - Instalment price to the item, e.g. $41.67/mo
installments.duration: String - Instalment duration in months, e.g. 24

shopping_results.reviews: String - Number of reviews of the item
shopping_results.price_history_link: String - Link to the price history
shopping_results.free_shipping: Boolean - Is the item shipping for free
shopping_results.top_pick: Boolean - Is the item on top pick
shopping_results.great_deal: Boolean - Is the item on great deal
shopping_results.special_offer: String - The content of item's special offer
shopping_results.ethical_choice: String - The 'Good On You' rating for the item's brand
shopping_results.product_token: String - Product token of the item
shopping_results.serpapi_bing_product_api: String - Link to the Bing Product API results of the product

options.link: String - Link to the filter results in Bing Shopping
options.serpapi_link: String - Link to the Bing Shopping results of the filter in JSON format by SerpApi

inline_ads_results.title: String - Title of the item result
inline_ads_results.thumbnail: String - URL to the item's thumbnail
inline_ads_results.seller: String - Seller's name of the item
inline_ads_results.extracted_price: Numeric - Item price as a float or integer (Ex: '14.99')
inline_ads_results.extracted_old_price: Numeric - Item's old price as float or integer (Ex: '15.99')
inline_ads_results.block_position: String - Position of the item on the page, one of 'top', 'middle' and 'bottom'
inline_ads_results.unit_price: String - The unit price to the item

installments.installments: String - Instalment price to the item, e.g. $41.67/mo
installments.duration: String - Instalment duration in months, e.g. 24

inline_ads_results.reviews: String - Number of reviews of the item
inline_ads_results.free_shipping: Boolean - Is the item shipping for free

tag.top: String - The tag to the item on the top
tag.bottom: String - The tag to the item on the bottom

ads_results.title: String - Title of the item result
ads_results.displayed_link: String - Displayed link to the item
ads_results.extensions: Array - List of extensions to the item result
